title: Define Gemini maintenance scan contract
goal: Define and validate a Cabinet Gemini maintenance scan output contract that keeps Gemini output proposal-only, evidence-bound and effect-free.

acceptance.assertion: A cabinet.gemini_maintenance_scan.v1 contract and schema define scan id, createdAt, source commit, evidence manifest, lane id, findings, effect flags and doesNotEstablish.
Findings separate observed, plausible and speculative statements, and observed findings require evidence refs.
The validator rejects any true effect flag for task creation, queue mutation, dispatch, issue/PR/comment creation, push/merge, runtime mutation, cleanup or dump generation.
The contract states that Gemini output does not establish task approval, claim truth, merge readiness, runtime correctness, Bureau import or autonomous dispatch.
